# gsm_environment_autoscaling_group (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `autoscaling_group_name` (String) Name of the autoscaling group
- `environment_id` (String) Environment ID where the autoscaling group belongs

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the autoscaling group
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `targets` (List of Object) Autoscaling targets configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--targets))

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `default` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--targets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `targets`

Read-Only:

- `cluster_name` (String)
- `max_pods` (Number)
- `weight` (Number)
